::: {.post-glossary}
- [Overview](index.qmd)
- [1. Problems with mmCIF](01-problems.qmd)
- [2. Architecture](02-architecture.qmd)
- [3. Composition](03-composition.qmd)
- [4. Annotations and computed passes](04-annotations-and-passes.qmd)
- [5. Open questions](05-open-questions.qmd)
- [Appendix: black-box data](06-black-box-data.qmd)
- [Appendix: modularity examples](07-modularity-examples.qmd)
:::
